criteria_verification.criterion_text: `get_video_info` tool visible in MCP Inspector (`npx @anthropic-ai/mcp-inspector python -m src`)
criteria_verification.evidence: Verified by sending MCP JSON-RPC initialize + tools/list requests to the server via stdio. The tools/list response contains exactly one tool named 'get_video_info'. The tool is registered at module level using @mcp.tool() decorator in src/__main__.py (line 38). Additionally, test_mcp_inspector_verification.py::TestMCPInspectorVisibility confirms tool is in mcp._tool_manager._tools.
criteria_verification.notes: Verified by sending MCP JSON-RPC initialize + tools/list requests to the server via stdio. The tools/list response contains exactly one tool named 'get_video_info'. The tool is registered at module level using @mcp.tool() decorator in src/__main__.py (line 38). Additionally, test_mcp_inspector_verification.py::TestMCPInspectorVisibility confirms tool is in mcp._tool_manager._tools.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Tool shows correct parameter schema (video_url: string)
criteria_verification.evidence: MCP tools/list response shows inputSchema: {"properties":{"video_url":{"title":"Video Url","type":"string"}},"required":["video_url"],"title":"get_video_infoArguments","type":"object"}. video_url is the only required parameter and is typed as string. Tests in test_mcp_inspector_verification.py::TestParameterSchema verify schema_has_video_url_property, video_url_is_string_type, video_url_is_required, and schema_has_no_extra_required_params.
criteria_verification.notes: MCP tools/list response shows inputSchema: {"properties":{"video_url":{"title":"Video Url","type":"string"}},"required":["video_url"],"title":"get_video_infoArguments","type":"object"}. video_url is the only required parameter and is typed as string. criteria_verification.criterion_text: Tool docstring visible for LLM discovery
criteria_verification.evidence: MCP tools/list response includes full description field with: tool purpose ('Get metadata for a YouTube video'), supported URL formats (5 formats listed), return fields (video_id, title, channel, duration_formatted, description_snippet, has_captions, has_auto_captions, available_languages). Tests in test_mcp_inspector_verification.py::TestToolDocstringDiscovery verify description is non-empty, mentions YouTube, URL formats, and metadata fields.
